parameters: After a long journey to the next village
Sora and the party feel stronger and more adapted
"THE SUN SHINED BRIGHTER WHEN SHE WAS HERE"
Do you wanna go down there?
Ann should be able to fit through this gap
Hereee, you guys can climb up now!
If you weren’t there earlier... w-we probably would’ve died...
U-Ughh, Zuko’s right... sorry it took me so long to realize...
The people of Firsta were doing \C[1]illegal mining with mercury...
So the fumes spread through the forest and caused \C[1]hallucinations...
B-But... there wasn’t anything there earlier...
That’s how mercury works... \C[1]a silent killer...
It’s okay, guys! I’m just glad you’re all safeee!
Do you guys wanna rest for a bit?
Crappp... but are we going the wrong wayy??
This path is a dead enddd...
You’re right, Zukooo... what do we do now?
There’s a gap in that rock! I think I can use my power to squeeze through it!
That’s a great idea, Ann! But how are we supposed to follow you?
Ahhh! Over there, there’s a ladder! I’ll lower it down for you guys!
Okayy, thanks Ann! We’ll wait hereee!
*You can now use Ann to \C[1]enter gaps in walls or rocks
Hahaha, I’m not giving this key to you guys
No one is allowed to leave Firstaaa
Are you crazyyy?! We’re all gonna die!
What would a snot-nosed brat like you know about death?
You already lost. Now give the key back
Ughh, damn it... fine, take it...
Why are you doing all this, old man?
That’s none of your business, kid
Hic... just stay back, kid... go on already, you got your key back...
You should come with us too, old man. It’s dangerous here.
Yeahh, you could get killed by the Elementa...
Just leave me be, kid... those graves belong to my wife and child...
They were killed by an Elementa while I was away working in the mines...
I should’ve never... left them alone...
Enough, kid... you all are still young. Keep moving forward on your journey
I’m just a man waiting for death now... I stopped living a long time ago...
Because my life already disappeared with them
And Firsta was my wife and child’s favorite place
So just this one last time... I don’t wanna leave them behind...
Now hurry up already... you kids need to keep going, right...?
* You got the Firsta Gate Key back
THAT STUPID DOGGG, COME ONNN LET’S CHASE ITTT!
